prompt:
Two changes needed:

1. In home/hyprland.nix, revert the DP-2 monitor scale back to 1. Change:
   "DP-2, highrr, auto, 1.25"
   to:
   "DP-2, highrr, auto, 1"

2. In hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix, re-add the GDK_DPI_SCALE session variable for GTK apps (Chrome, Emacs). Add it after the networking.hostName line, before the Monitor Control section:

   # Dell U4025QW: scale up GTK app fonts (~140 real DPI vs 96 assumed)
   environment.sessionVariables.GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.25";

Run nix flake check before creating the PR.
